unreleased_commits.author: JaredHatfield
unreleased_commits.message: gitrepoforge: updating codeql github action

unreleased_commits.author: JaredHatfield
unreleased_commits.message:
Enhance GitHub Actions workflows and configuration files

- Added cooldown configuration for Dependabot in dependabot.yml
- Set timeout for jobs in add-to-project.yml, build-go.yml, and zizmor.yml
- Updated permissions in build-go.yml for better security
- Improved CodeQL workflow by updating action versions and removing unnecessary comments
- Created new rules for dependabot cooldown in a new zizmor.yml file
- Refined .gitignore to include additional patterns and removed outdated entries
- Added .gitrepoforge for project configuration
- Updated LICENSE year to 2026
- Introduced justfile for build and test commands
- Enhanced documentation configuration in _config.yml
